title: Daki's Vanilla Plus
description: Improve your Minecraft experience by adding quality of life features and beautiful animations/effects, while keeping everything vanilla!
body:
# About
A simple, client-side survival modpack that enhances the vanilla experience by improving the game performance, adding quality of life features, and new animations!

# Important

<details>
<summary>Resourcepack Order</summary>
The order in which you should put your Resource Packs. '1' Means the Resource Pack is at the top, and '10' means the Resource Pack is at the bottom.

  
1. Icons Branding Remover _(Highly Recommended **IF** you use "Icons")_
2. Icons Additions _(Highly Recommended **IF** you use "Icons")_
3. Icons _(Optional)_
4. Unique Dark _(Highly Recommended)_
5. Light Leak _(Highly Recommended)_
6. Visual Efects+ _(Highly Recommended)_
7. Trailer Player Animations _(Highly Recommended)_
8. Eating Animation _(Highly Recommended)_
9. Icon Xaero's X FreshAnimations _(Highly Recommended **IF** you use "Fresh Animations")_
10. Fresh Animation _(Highly Recommended)_
11. Better Animations _(Highly Recommended)_
12. Ashen _(Optional)_
13. Fabric Mods
14. Default


</details>









# FAQ

> **Q**: Can I use this modpack on servers?
> 
> **A**: Yes, you can use this on every server. Some servers don't allow Freecam though.

> **Q**: What features does this Modpack add?
>
> **A**: This modpack adds beautiful animations, effects and other visual changes that improve your Minecraft experience.
